base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of overworld_first_quest — a tile (overworld_map) from 1986 legend of zelda. Hyrule overworld first-quest — 16 screens wide × 8 tall (16×8 = 128 screens at 256×176 each). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hyrule overworld first-quest — 16 screens wide × 8 tall (16×8 = 128 screens at 256×176 each); full map of Hyrule with Death Mountain NE, graveyard N, Lost Woods W, coastal S. Dungeons scattered across as cave-entrances
